# Task: Sprint planning store-write verification loop

> Task ID: FORGE-S12-T05
> Sprint: [FORGE-S12](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📋 planned
> Estimate: M

## Description

Agents executing architect_sprint_plan.md must verify that every write to the Forge store succeeds. If a PreToolUse hook rejects a write due to a schema violation, the agent must parse the error, correct the JSON, and retry — halting all further progress until the write is confirmed successful.
